name: max-validators
description: Edge case: maximum committee size of 200 validators to test hash chain scalability

input._generator: Validators are deterministically generated: address=0x{i:040x}, stake=32e18+i*1e18, scores=9000+(i%1000)/7000+(i%3000)/8000+(i%2000)/8000+(i%2000), tee_key=0x{i:064x}, commission=100+(i%900), rank=i+1

expected._note: Run 'node generate-expected.js' from test-vectors/ to populate expected hashes and validator array
